betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steel Furnace§f

§aA TU-powered furnace that processes 3 items at once with bonus output.§f

The §bSteel Furnace§f runs on §bTU§f (thermal units) from a firebox or other heat source. It can process 3 items simultaneously and gives a bonus output: every 4 items smelted yields a 5th free item for ores and wood.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at a Tier 2 anvil from stone bricks, iron ingots, steel plates, red copper, and steel grates.

§6Operation§f:
Heat transfer rate of ΔT × 0.05 TU/t. Each active slot increases TU consumption — pair with a strong heat source for best results.

§eTip§f: Excellent for automation due to its multi-slot processing and bonus yield.
